title: Verify assign and correct transaction categories contract
preconditions: Active and inactive transactions plus active root, intermediate, leaf, archived, renamed, and reparented categories are available.
steps: Assign and correct one category through the public contract; reject simultaneous split assignments and invalid lifecycle targets; query direct and subtree membership before and after rename and reparent.
expected: Each active transaction has zero or one current Category Assignment; history is attributable; current hierarchy roll-ups include the transaction exactly once per requested ancestor and never duplicate all-up actuals.
